ddls:
CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software release */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Version name of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the release was made */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes detailing the changes and updates */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the release (e.g., beta, stable, alpha) */,
  "is_major_release" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for major releases */,
  "is_minor_release" INTEGER /* Boolean flag for minor releases */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the release was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "granularities" (
  "granularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each granularity level */,
  "granularity_name" TEXT /* Name of the granularity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the granularity level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the granularity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the granularity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("granularity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* ID of the software release */,
  "granularity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the granularity level */,
  "valid_count" INTEGER /* Count of valid instances */,
  "bug_count" INTEGER /* Count of bug occurrences */,
  "error_rate" TEXT /* Error rate calculated based on valid and bug counts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_granularity_id FOREIGN KEY ("granularity_id") REFERENCES granularities ("granularity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric related to the bug */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the report */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool (e.g., Jira, GitHub) */,
  "ci_cd_pipeline" TEXT /* Name of the CI/CD pipeline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., bug report, new release) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Result of the audit (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
